mnemonics.title: Page Fault Handling Steps
mnemonics.content: TCLUR: Trap → Check → Load → Update → Restart. Remember: 'Tiny Cats Lick Urgent Rats' for the sequence: Trap handler starts, Check validity, Locate free frame, Update page table, Restart instruction

mnemonics.title: Page Replacement Algorithms
mnemonics.content: OPT For Least Future Use: Optimal (OPT), FIFO (First-In First-Out), LRU (Least Recently Used), LFU (Least Frequently Used). Remember order of efficiency from best to worst

mnemonics.title: Copy-on-Write Trigger
mnemonics.content: COW = Clone Only When Written. Process gets own copy only when modifying shared pages

mnemonics.title: Belady's Anomaly Victims
mnemonics.content: FIFO Falls For Belady's. Only FIFO page replacement shows increased page faults with more frames

acronyms.usage: Hardware that converts virtual addresses to physical addresses
Cache for page table entries to speed up address translation
Memory optimization technique for shared resources
Physical memory location identifier in paging systems

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a magic bookshelf that can store infinite books (pages). Only frequently used books stay on shelf (RAM), others are in storage (disk). Librarian (OS) fetches when needed
Picture a hotel registry: Room numbers (physical frames) vs Guest names (process pages). Concierge (MMU) uses this to direct visitors
Visualize a panicked librarian constantly running between shelves and storage, unable to keep up with book requests (excessive page faults)
Like Netflix streaming - only load video segments (pages) when viewer actually needs them, not the entire movie upfront

analogies.analogy: Like a food court: You only pay for dishes (pages) you actually eat, not the entire buffet upfront
Coat check at events: When full, staff (OS) removes least important coats (pages) to make space for new arrivals
Shared Google Doc: Everyone works on same document until someone makes edits, then they automatically get a personal copy
Forgetting where you parked: When TLB has no entry (memory fails), you need to check full directory (page table) which takes longer
